name: x402-error-not-accepted
description: Golden fixture for HTTP 422 X402_NOT_ACCEPTED with subcause=capability_wallet_only (the agent presented X-Payment against a capability that only accepts the Stripe wallet path).
scenario: agent submits X-Payment to a capability whose manifest declares payment_methods: ["stripe"] (or omits the field, defaulting to ["stripe"])

error.message: Capability content-factory/summarize does not accept x402 payments. Drop X-Payment and use the wallet path.

postconditions: facilitator was NOT called (validation fires before any facilitator round-trip)
the agent's signed authorization is NOT consumed (no nonce burn at the JECP layer; the signature itself remains replay-able on a different x402-accepting capability if the agent chooses)
